explanation: The user's instruction 'lets put it in the same cabinet' refers to placing the currently found object (potato_2) into the same cabinet as the others, which is cabinet_4. The old plan successfully found potato_2 on the countertop. Since the robot is not currently holding any object, we first pick it up. Then, we navigate to cabinet_4 (which is already open, as per the state) and place the potato there. This action aligns with the user's intent to put the object into the same cabinet (cabinet_4) as the existing potatoes.
